name: HyperFrames Adapter for Hanako
description: A Hanako-styled HyperFrames video workspace with preview, timeline, lint, and render tools.

hyperframesCommand.title: HyperFrames command
hyperframesCommand.description: Command used to run HyperFrames. Defaults to npx --yes hyperframes.

previewIdleMinutes.title: Preview idle timeout
previewIdleMinutes.description: Minutes before idle preview processes are stopped.
